Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney'S Fees Purusant To Civil Code 1717, Ccp1033.5 & Ccp685.040; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration
Off Calendar Dec-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1540. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -
Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post-judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
